name: VERT
compose:
name: slashnode-vert
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/vert-sh/vert:sha-438f91a
    container_name: vert
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUB_HOSTNAME: http://${node.exports.host}:3884
      PUB_VERTD_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3884
      PUB_ENV: production
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3884:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
